qr.title: QR Code Scanner
qr.subtitle: Step 1 / 3 — QR Verification
qr.invalidQr: QR code is invalid or unrecognized.
qr.verifyFailed: QR code could not be verified. Please try again.
qr.cameraRequiredBody: Camera access is required to scan QR codes.
qr.autoScan: QR code will be scanned automatically

face.title: Face Recognition
face.subtitle: Step 2 / 3 — Face Verification
face.invalidSession: Invalid session. Please start from the QR scan step.
face.photoFailed: Could not capture photo. Please try again.
face.scanFailed: An error occurred during face scan.
face.cameraRequiredBody: Camera access is required for face recognition.
face.loginCameraRequiredBody: Camera access is required for identity verification.
face.cameraSettingsBody: Camera access is required for face recognition. Please enable camera permission in settings.
face.pressToStart: Press the button to start scanning
face.lightHint: Make sure you have enough light
face.lightHintCamera: Camera could not start — check camera permission or restart the app
face.instruction1: Center your face in the frame
face.instruction2: Make sure you are in a well-lit environment
face.instruction3: Move your head slightly during the countdown
face.tipsGoodLight: • Keep your face in a well-lit environment
face.tipsNoGlasses: • Do not wear glasses or a mask
face.tipsLookAtCamera: • Look directly at the camera and hold still
face.alignFace: Align your face in the frame, then press the button

errors.noReferenceBody: No registered face found. You must register your face before continuing with attendance.
errors.noFaceBody: Your face could not be detected in the frame. Look directly at the camera in a well-lit environment and try again.
errors.livenessBody: Static image detected. Move your head slightly during the scan and try again.
errors.mismatchBody: Your face did not match the registered image. Try again in good lighting without glasses. If the problem persists, re-register your face.
errors.unknownBody: An error occurred during face recognition. Please try again.
errors.loginBlockedBody: Too many failed attempts. Your session is being closed for security.
errors.notRecognizedBody:
Your face could not be verified. You have {{remaining}} attempt(s) left.

Try again in a well-lit environment without glasses or a mask.

face.verifySubtitle: Face scan required to sign in
face.switchAccount: Cancel — Sign In with Different Account

gps.title: GPS Verification
gps.subtitle: Step 3 / 3 — Location Check

flags.fakeGps: Flagged for review due to fake GPS / low accuracy

gps.permissionDenied: Location permission denied. Location access is required for attendance.
gps.locationFailedRetry: Could not get location. Please try again.
gps.locationVerifiedBody: Your location has been verified successfully.
gps.suspiciousLocationBody: Location match looks suspicious. Your attendance was sent for review.
gps.outsideSub: You must be inside the classroom to check in
gps.outsideWarning: Try again from closer to the classroom. GPS signal may be weak indoors.
gps.permissionRequiredSub: Enable location permission in settings to check in

register.title: Face Registration
register.poseLeftDesc: Turn your head slightly to the left
register.poseRightDesc: Turn your head slightly to the right
register.successBody: Your face has been registered. Now verify your identity.
register.failed: Face registration failed. Please try again.
register.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
register.registerCameraBody: Camera access is required for face registration.
register.onboardingLogin: You must register your face once to sign in to the app.
register.onboardingAttendance: You must register your face once to check in for attendance.
register.tipsInFrame: • Keep your face inside the frame

excuse.title: Submit Excuse
excuse.galleryRequired: Grant gallery permission to select a photo.
excuse.attachmentBody: How would you like to add it?
excuse.missingFields: Select an excuse type and write at least 10 characters of explanation.
excuse.missingCourse: Course information is missing. Select an absent class from your history.
excuse.success: Your excuse has been sent to the instructor.
excuse.allowedFileTypes: Only PDF, JPG, or PNG files can be uploaded.
excuse.uploadFailedWithReason: Excuse was saved but document upload failed: {{reason}}
excuse.uploadFailedGeneric: Excuse was saved but document upload failed. Please try again.

errors.boundarySubtitle: The app encountered an unexpected error. Please try again.
